---
title: "about"
---


I've recently grown a mustache. To many folks suprise, this was Hattie's idea! I always thought my facial hair was sub-par, but I get compliments all the time. So, if you're considering a mustache I say go for it!


This is Kevin.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "kevin"
#| fig-align: center
knitr::include_graphics("images/kevin.jpg")
```

column margin Kevin

:::{.column-margin}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "kevin"
#| fig-align: center
#| fig-width: 2
#| fig-height: 1
knitr::include_graphics("images/kevin.jpg")
```
:::

Hattie & I picked him up in September. He was 10 lbs. A month later he was 21 lbs. Kevin is a large guy (and a very good boy).


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-cap: "Hattie, Kevin, & Me"
#| fig-align: center
knitr::include_graphics("images/hattie_kevin_me.jpg")
```


This past summer I was invited to play in the Indy City Futbol league. It's a soccer league with teams corresponding to the different Indianapolis neighborhoods. I had a ton of fun.
